data.title: XBRL US partners with CRAFT to enhance research in structured data for financial tech. Conference set for Spring 2026.
data.description: A collaborative conference focusing on enhancing artificial intelligence (AI) is scheduled for Spring 2026 in New York. XBRL US, a nonprofit organization committed to enhancing reporting through an open data standard, has partnered with the Center for Research toward Advancing Financial Technologies (CRAFT). The conference aims to optimize AI technologies and is set to take place in the spring of 2026. This collaboration showcases the importance of advancing financial technologies and leveraging AI for improved reporting standards. Stay tuned for more information on this significant event.

data.title: INTA opens registration for 2026 Annual Meeting in London, May 2-6. Marks its 148th meeting. Successful pre-registration.
data.description: The 148th Annual Meeting of the International Trademark Association (INTA) has been announced to be held in London, England from May 2 to May 6, 2026. The event registration has now commenced following the record-breaking pre-registration numbers in the association's history, indicating strong interest and participation.

data.title: Unitek Learning offers Carson Tahoe Health employees BSN, PN, and MA programs to enhance education opportunities.
data.description: In Tempe, Arizona on January 15, 2026, Unitek Learning disclosed the introduction of new educational programs for healthcare professionals. The programs include Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN), Practical Nursing (PN), and Medical Assisting (MA) for employees at Carson Tahoe. Unitek Learning is renowned for its healthcare education and workforce development initiatives.

data.title: Fusion Advisors partners with Victory Live for commercial strategy in live events. Founded by Greg Kish and Sam Soni, CEO.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Fusion Advisors, a strategic advisory firm established by Greg Kish, revealed a new partnership with Victory Live, the primary ticketing technology and analytics corporation for live events led by CEO Sam Soni. This collaboration aims to enhance the industry through their combined expertise.

data.title: FAU earns Carnegie Community Engagement Classification for 2026, one of 277 U.S. universities, 11 with three designations.
data.description: Boca Raton, Florida - In a significant achievement, Florida Atlantic University has been recognized as one of only 277 colleges and universities in the United States to receive the prestigious Carnegie Community Engagement Classification for the year 2026. This elective designation is awarded to institutions that demonstrate exceptional commitment to community engagement. Notably, FAU is also among the select group of just 11 universities nationally to have secured three Carnegie designations, showcasing its strong emphasis on community collaboration and outreach. This recognition underscores FAU's dedication to fostering meaningful relationships beyond the campus and its impact on broader society.

data.title: TSMC reports 35% increase in net profit in Q4, signaling strong AI demand. CRWV stock rising.详情 at Benzinga.com.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (NYSE: TSM) released an impressive Q4 earnings report, signaling robust growth in AI demand. TSMC, as the sole producer of NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) GPUs, reported a remarkable 35% increase in net profit, surpassing analyst predictions. This demonstrates the ongoing strength of the AI market. Concurrently, CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) stock is experiencing an uptick in value, reflecting the positive trend. For neocloud providers such as CoreWeave, the booming demand for AI technology presents significant opportunities. Access the detailed article on the topic at Benzinga.com.

data.title: Arbonne opens new Irvine, California headquarters with open workspaces and conference rooms.
data.description: In January 2026, Arbonne employees in Irvine, California marked the opening of their new headquarters with enthusiasm. The state-of-the-art offices boast open workspaces and conference rooms designed to foster teamwork and communication. The building in Irvine sets the stage for a new chapter as employees embrace the modern and collaborative environment.

data.title: Shipley Donuts named top donut franchise on 2026 Entrepreneur Franchise 500. Leading brand for 5th year.
data.description: An esteemed brand based in Texas has once again emerged as the leader in its industry for the fifth consecutive year. Shipley Donuts, a renowned establishment known for its freshly made donuts and kolaches, has secured the top position among donut franchises in the recently published 2026 report. With its commitment to delivering high-quality, handcrafted treats, Shipley Donuts continues to solidify its position as the number one choice in the market.

data.title: Anfield Energy supports Trump's move on Processed Critical Minerals, emphasizing national security and domestic uranium production.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC - On January 15, 2026, Anfield Energy Inc. (TSX.V: AEC; NASDAQ: AEC; FRANKFURT: 0AD), a prominent U.S.-centered uranium and vanadium development firm moving closer to imminent production, expressed approval for President Trump’s declaration on January 14, 2026, under Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962. This proclamation, entitled “Adjusting Imports of Processed Critical Minerals and Their Derivative Products into the United States”, mandates negotiations with trade partners to tackle national security hazards related to imports of processed critical minerals (such as uranium) and their derivatives. The emphasis is on safeguarding and advancing domestic mining, processing, and supply chains.
Brent Crude futures settle at $63.76/bbl, down $2.76, 4.15%

data.title: Correction: USPS reports increased on-time delivery and higher customer satisfaction during holiday season in 2026.
data.description: According to a recent press release, the U.S. Postal Service has reported improvements in on-time delivery rates and increased customer satisfaction during the holiday season. The update was issued on January 15, 2026. As a result of these improvements, there has been a noticeable increase in timely deliveries and overall customer happiness. Additionally, a correction has been made to the email contact information for media inquiries. This demonstrates a positive change in performance and service quality for USPS.

data.title: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges ONTF, FFIC, OCFC shareholders to discuss their rights. Limited time.
data.description: Investors are advised to promptly reach out to the company as there is a restricted window to exercise their rights. In New York on January 15, 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in investor rights, is scrutinizing a list of companies for potential infringements of federal securities laws and breaches of regulations. It is imperative for shareholders to take timely action to protect their interests.

data.title: Breakthrough T1D awards $1.5 million grant to Blue Circle Health for underserved adults with Type 1 Diabetes.
data.description: A $1.5 million, three-year grant has been announced by Breakthrough T1D, a prominent global organization dedicated to type 1 diabetes (T1D) research and advocacy. The grant aims to enhance insurance and Medicaid guidance, as well as continuity of care for adults managing T1D.

data.title: Rose Bowl Stadium is investing $30M in a new South End Zone Field Club for modernization, official announced.
data.description: Pasadena, California - The Rose Bowl Operating Company (RBOC) revealed the commencement of the construction of the South End Zone Field Club on January 15, 2026. This project, costing $30 million, signifies a significant strategic investment by the Stadium to enhance its facilities through modernization. The initiative aims to uphold the Stadium's legacy while adapting to contemporary needs.
